title: Crypsinus oodes
intro: Crypsinus oodes, also known as Ground Pine or Japanese Spikenard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Polypodiaceae family, typically found in shaded, humid environments. The health benefits of Crypsinus oodes include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and lignans, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Crypsinus oodes include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal benefits in traditional Chinese medicine and other Asian herbal practices.
taxonomy: Crypsinus oodes is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Crypsinus, which consists of a few species of Asian ferns.
